---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TradeDiary
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Example: "I find it difficult to track my risk per trade because..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or any other context that helps explain the request.
